creator: spock@sarahspock.com
text:
Common workstation ethernet card: Aquantia 10G LAN (aquantia-atlantic-kmod), known to be used on the following:

- Lenovo workstation P620
- Motherboard Asrock Z390 Taichi 
- Motherboard Asrock X399 Fatal1ty

Has broken support due to a regression and lack of maintainers on the aquantia-atlantic-kmod port .
